name: Add a Discount Group
body: [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Discounts that are grouped together will mean that only one will apply to customers in checkout. Running multiple discounts at once lets you define which discounts can be applied together, and which can\u2019t."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Important", "bold": true}, {"text": ": Discounts can only be grouped together when using the "}, {"text": "Product Cost Cap", "bold": true}, {"text": " discount event with the "}, {"text": "Cart Quantity", "bold": true}, {"text": "\u00a0discount condition. Please see our "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/1360-add-a-discount-coupon", "children": [{"text": "help article"}]}, {"text": " for instructions on how to add a discount/coupon."}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Add a Discount Group"}], "data-id": "create-a-discount-group"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "To get started grouping discounts, you first need to create a discount group."}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "In your\u00a0Neto control panel\u00a0navigate to "}, {"text": "Marketing", "bold": true}, {"text": " > "}, {"text": "Discount Groups", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click "}, {"text": "Create new Discount Group", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Enter a "}, {"text": "Name", "bold": true}, {"text": " for your discount group and click "}, {"text": "Save", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "You have now created a discount group."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Add Discounts/Coupons to a Group"}], "data-id": "add-discountscoupons-to-a-group"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Once your groups are created you can start grouping your discounts."}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "In your\u00a0Neto control panel navigate to "}, {"text": "Marketing", "bold": true}, {"text": " > "}, {"text": "Discounts/Coupons", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click on a discount that is using "}, {"text": "Cart Quantity", "bold": true}, {"text": " as one of the conditions, and "}, {"text": "Product Cost Cap", "bold": true}, {"text": " as the discount."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "In the "}, {"text": "Additional Rules", "bold": true}, {"text": " section find the "}, {"text": "Discount Group", "bold": true}, {"text": " setting. Choose the group you\u2019ve created."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "You also need to enter a value in the "}, {"text": "Sort Order", "bold": true}, {"text": " field. The discount with the lowest sort order in the group will be applied to the customer\u2019s order, if multiple conditions are met."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click "}, {"text": "Save", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Repeat these steps for all other discounts that should be grouped together."}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Now when a customer\u2019s order satisfies the conditions on more than one discount, the one with the lowest sort order in the group will be applied in checkout."}]}]
